title: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue
display_title: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue
wikitext:
[]: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Thu Aug 12, 2021 9:22 pm I've always assumed the redhead woman in the Epilogue was Asuka, but I'm starting to doubt that after seeing the movie. Shinji's vision focus on Kaworu and Rei, but he doesn't focus on the redhead woman. Also, unlike Rei and Kaworu, the situation with Asuka was pretty clear before the Epilogue.

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Aug 12, 2021 9:32 pm Yes, it's unquestionably Asuka. The hair, the posture, the fact she's playing her Wonderswan.

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by pokcay » Thu Aug 12, 2021 9:55 pm yep, pretty much sure that's her

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Aug 12, 2021 11:32 pm Yeah, it is definitely Asuka. What's more, in the first two shots of that side of the station you see a woman with suspiciously puple hair and a suspiciously blue bandana(?) on her collar. There's a not insignificant chance this might be Misato SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Aug 13, 2021 3:48 am Blockio wrote: Yeah, it is definitely Asuka. What's more, in the first two shots of that side of the station you see a woman with suspiciously puple hair and a suspiciously blue bandana(?) on her collar. There's a not insignificant chance this might be Misato SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by ManureTruck » Fri Aug 13, 2021 3:53 am Yeah, there's no way that's NOT Asuka. The intent of the scene is pretty clear (similar to the manga ending even, but much less melancholy than the manga). Asuka, Rei, Kaworu, Mari, Shinji are all there. I think the Misato thing is wishful thinking. She is wearing a high school uniform, as is another low-detail/generic girl on the left in Shinji's FOV, next to Asuka - whereas all the others are "aged up" to match the appropriate passage of time as if Shinji had not kept resetting things - Misato would be present as an older adult in street clothes, like the others, and not in a Japanese seifuku-style school uniform - I think he may have "let her go" just like happened in the manga, although in that case I'm surprised Rei wasn't also "let go" but I think Anno, this time around, was trying to find a balance of both pleasing fans and angering them, lol. The gigantic middle finger to all the shippers from Anno, I fully expected that (have since 3.33 was released) but still satisfying to see. I'm very happy he made the relationships (the ones that people ship all the time, Rei/Asuka/Kaworu) primarily platonic in the end, though the Mari thing is weird as hell and completely out of left field. Still wrapping my head around that one.

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Fri Aug 13, 2021 4:40 am Jayfive wrote: ... the fact she's playing her Wonderswan.

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Aug 13, 2021 6:32 am The gigantic middle finger to all the shippers from Anno,

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Fri Aug 13, 2021 6:37 am Owww shit, Anno killed my waifu (Asuka), let him get him.

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Fri Aug 13, 2021 7:53 am Wait a minut, Asuka's voice actor confirmed (Yuko Miyamura) that this is Asuka

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Fri Aug 13, 2021 7:57 am Asugran233 wrote: Wait a minut, Asuka's voice actor confirmed (Yuko Miyamura) that this is Asuka

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Fri Aug 13, 2021 8:27 am Yes confirmed in Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: 3.0+1.0 Program Book (The bootleg) quotes: "However, at the stage greeting this time around - when Ogata talked about one more Shinji who remains behind after having sent off everyone - the feeling "I want him to go meet the adult Asuka!" grew stronger too." I think that Shinji also almost certainly meet the adult Asuka, meet Yui, and various other people but I definitely want the fans to complete the rest of the story."

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Fri Aug 13, 2021 8:35 am Asugran233 wrote: Yes confirmed in Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: 3.0+1.0 Program Book (The bootleg)

[]: Re: Is Asuka the redhead woman in the Epilogue?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Fri Aug 13, 2021 8:49 am Oh, I just got it wrong
